name: @borjie/ephemeral-ui
description: Ephemeral software runtime — function-attached dashboards. Every domain function declares a FunctionUIManifest; composeDashboardForFunction emits a TabRecipe on demand, lived briefly, discarded by default, promoted to a learned recipe on demonstrated reuse. Companion to Docs/STRATEGY/EPHEMERAL_SOFTWARE_SOTA.md and Docs/DESIGN/FUNCTION_ATTACHED_DASHBOARD_SPEC.md.
